config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.

records.output_text: "We're going to be alive today." The timer on this machine would automatically reset after 5 minutes without changing from time till now until we'd finished our analysis (with an extra 30 seconds left). This way it could always count towards doing something important when I need some help or just go back for another quick refresh with my notebook at 10pm that night before heading off home...or more precisely every hour since then! If you were using all your spare hours between 3am - 8am instead, how do you feel about having such short breaks? No problem; they don't make me bored…

TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. "We're going to be alive today." The timer on this machine would automatically reset after 5 minutes without changing from time till now until we'd finished our analysis (with an extra 30 seconds left). This way it could always count towards doing something important when I need some help or just go back for another quick refresh with my notebook at 10pm that night before heading off home...or more precisely every hour since then! If you were using all your spare hours between 3am - 8am instead, how do you feel about having such short breaks? No problem; they don't make me bored…
